title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Kiku, Tsuru, Unknown person #13, Luffy, Tama as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry! - Go and boil some jyagan* grass for me!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: O-TAMA- CHAN DRAK THE RIVER'S POISON!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's terrible! I'll go make it immedi- lately!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: On top of a certain mountain...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Should we go call them over before they cause trouble!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You stand out too much, bepo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: «The worst have a presence here, too....!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 12 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
